description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

June 16 (Tuesday) at 10 a.m., gather at the west parking lot of Hanno City Hall. We will hold a Sugo-Ashi leisurely walk.

Depending on weather and number of participants, you can choose from two routes:

• Route (1): City Hall → Benzaiten → Chikan-ji Temple → Nakayama-Nishi Signal → Yatsuita → Ninin-ji Temple → Central Park → Motogo Water Purification Plant → Hanno River Stepping Stone Bridge → Hanno Station → Higashi-Hanno Station → City Hall (approximately 7 kilometers, approximately 2 hours 30 minutes)

• Route (2): City Hall → Hanno City area (Shimokaji, Futayanagi, Kaji, etc.) → Iruma City area (Shinko, Noda, etc.) → Fushiko Station (return by train)

Free admission. Please bring: drinking water, rain gear, IC card for public transport, Sugo-Ashi handbook (if you have one). Insurance is your own responsibility.

Walk-ins welcome (please arrive by the meeting time). To confirm cancellations due to weather or other reasons, check the Hanno Walking Club website or contact Onda (090-2205-8073) after 3 p.m. the day before.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/12785.html
summary: ℹ️ Sugo-Ashi Event: Sugo-Ashi Leisurely Walk – June 16, 2026 (Tuesday)
